title: E2E for supported device page and color theme flow
scenario: E2E test for supported device page and color theme flow through onboarding, device selection, and settings navigation
steps: Access the color theme from the main menu
expected: The user can successfully navigate through the entire flow: from onboarding (accepting notifications/EULA, welcome page, guest login, PPIP, location, onboarding screens) to the no-device page, selecting a device, returning via back drawer, accessing and verifying the color theme page, navigating to General > About and verifying it, returning to the no-device page, and re-selecting a device.
